title: Closeout Session Runner v5.6
recommendedDecision: Use v5.6 to rehearse the private owner closeout session, test attendance and evidence votes, resolve or hold blockers, export private minute shells, approve only public-safe lines, and then decide whether the repeat P0 run can be scheduled. Do not proceed to limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, or live Decidim access until v5.6 session minutes are privately accepted, v5.5 owner closeout passes, and the repeat P0 run also passes privately.
sessionRule: Use v5.6 to rehearse and document the private owner closeout meeting before any repeat P0 run; it is a runner and minute-prep layer, not owner approval.
voteRule: Each required owner must be present or represented by an accepted alternate before their evidence vote can be counted.
blockerRule: Any blocked authority, privacy, IDS/data, official boundary, provider, security, support, quorum, or final-minute item keeps the repeat run on hold.
launchBlockRule: Limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access remain blocked until the v5.6 session minute is privately accepted, v5.5 owner closeout passes, and the repeat P0 run also passes privately.

evidenceVotes.evidenceNeed: Private authority roster and minute placeholder.
evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Chair and alternate recorded with quorum authority.
evidenceVotes.blocker: No named chair or unclear authority route.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Authority remains private and unresolved; no pilot has been approved.

evidenceVotes.blocker: Copy implies real intake or unclear withdrawal.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private owner review.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: No real outbound email can send from the demo.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Any real email sends or live invite is implied.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: No outbound email is active for real participants.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Export, delete, retention, and custody pass privately.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Delete proof absent or retention unclear.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Data export, deletion, and retention controls remain under private review.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Support owner confirms pause and escalation route.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Complaint path has no owner or no pause route.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Support routes are not live services.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: No official member, payment, education, officer, or club workflow is active.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains a fake/sample guest and boundary tester only.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Public package shows only aggregate status and custody placeholders.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Private evidence is not published in the public package.

evidenceVotes.evidenceNeed: Provider refusal proof and RFQ boundary approval.
evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Provider real-record asks are rejected and redirected to fake/sample schemas only.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Provider receives or is promised real records, official records, outbound email, credentials, logs, or live access.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Guest support wording cannot read as official member service.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Copy implies member service, officer, payment, education, or official record.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: First Nations Toastmasters sample records do not represent official member services.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Security reviewer accepts fake/sample environment proof.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Credential, log, restore, or revoke proof missing.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: No live Decidim access is approved by this public demo.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Admin access has expiry, revoke route, and owner approval.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Unrestricted or unowned admin access appears.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: No live admin access is approved by this public demo.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: RFQ excludes real records, official Toastmasters data, outbound email, credentials, and live access.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Provider scope implies live or real-record access.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Provider or self-build options remain under fake/sample-only review.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Every required owner has an alternate and attendance state.
evidenceVotes.blocker: No quorum or missing owner alternate.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Named owners must approve their own gates privately.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: No real business-sensitive or contact fields appear.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test path.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Public line says preparation only and does not imply launch.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Public wording implies approval, launch, or private evidence pass.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: The public demo remains a fake/sample preparation tool; no live pilot has been approved.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Reviewers can follow agenda, evidence, closeout, and decision paths.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Reviewer pack lacks closeout sprint steps.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: The demo now includes an owner closeout sprint layer.

evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Proceed, repeat, and no-go/archive options are explicit.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Decision minute implies proceed before closeout.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: The next valid step is closeout sprint, repeat testing, or no-go/archive.

evidenceVotes.evidenceNeed: Private calendar hold and stop trigger register.
evidenceVotes.acceptanceTest: Calendar, quorum, evidence folder, and stop triggers are confirmed.
evidenceVotes.blocker: Repeat run starts before P0 closeout readiness.
evidenceVotes.publicSafeLine: Preparation continues; no pilot has been approved.

providerBoundaryTests.refusalLine: We cannot provide real participant records for this fake/sample review.

providerBoundaryTests.refusalLine: Admin credentials cannot be shared outside the approved channel.
